summary: BC Posting Patterns Phase 2 testing completed. All 10 backend tests passed and all 9 frontend UI checks passed. Verified: (1) GET /api/posting-patterns/settings returns default settings with auto_post_enabled, min_confidence, min_invoices_analyzed, (2) PUT /api/posting-patterns/settings saves and returns updated settings, (3) GET /api/posting-patterns/ready-queue returns empty queue with count, (4) GET /api/posting-patterns/vendor-summary returns vendor list with confidence, ready_docs, auto_post_eligible fields, (5) GET /api/posting-patterns/status returns posting pattern analysis status, (6) GET /api/posting-patterns/analyze-top/status returns background analysis status, (7) POST /api/posting-patterns/draft-preview/nonexistent returns error for missing doc, (8) POST /api/posting-patterns/create-draft/nonexistent returns error for missing doc. Frontend: /posting-intelligence page loads with BC Posting Intelligence header, Posting AI nav item in sidebar, Auto-Post Settings card with toggle/dropdown/save button, Vendor Posting Profiles card with empty state, Ready for Posting card with empty state, Confidence Breakdown card with High/Medium/Low counts, Analyze Top 20 button is clickable.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review confirms all Phase 2 posting pattern features are properly implemented:
2. POST /draft-preview/{doc_id} (lines 445-541) and POST /create-draft/{doc_id} (lines 544-572) properly handle missing documents
3. PostingPatternsDashboard.js: All UI components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
4. Layout.js: 'Posting AI' nav item with Brain icon properly configured at line 25
5. App.js: Route /posting-intelligence properly configured at line 47
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing data (empty state expected due to no BC credentials in preview)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BC Posting Patterns Phase 2 fully tested. Key endpoints verified: /api/posting-patterns/settings (GET/PUT), /api/posting-patterns/ready-queue, /api/posting-patterns/vendor-summary, /api/posting-patterns/status, /api/posting-patterns/analyze-top/status, /api/posting-patterns/draft-preview/{doc_id}, /api/posting-patterns/create-draft/{doc_id}. NOTE: BC API calls will return empty data on preview environment (no BC credentials) - this is expected. The settings were already saved with auto_post_enabled=true, min_confidence=medium, min_invoices_analyzed=15 from manual testing. Frontend dashboard at /posting-intelligence displays all cards correctly with empty state messages.
